title: The Sculk Sword
description: A Simple mod that adds a Sword by defeating the Warden.
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/746adab8e7c7e6149978822604be9918126ddbd1.png)

Have you been disappointed by the lack of an award when you slay the Warden? Well this simple mod is for you. 

The new Sculk Zweihänder can only be obtained though killing the Warden, so better bring some good gear. But when you do obtain this powerful sword, you can upgrade to a diamond variant for more power. But if you want it to be even more powerful, and not be burned up by accident. The Sculk Zweihänder can be upgraded into a Netherite Variant. Overall, it makes traveling down to the Ancient City more worthwhile.

This mod has compatibility with [Better Combat](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/better-combat-by-daedelus) (Unless you use the Neoforge version, than it won't have compatibility)!


QnA

Q: Will this mod have more compatibility with other mods?

A: Maybe, I'm open to having more different material types for the Sculk Zweihänder.

Q: Can I use this in a modpack?

A: Yes
